scripts.cucumber: npm run setup:reports && npx cypress run --e2e --spec "cypress/e2e/features/*.feature"
scripts.cucumber:smoke: npm run setup:reports && npx cypress run --e2e --env TAGS="@Smoke" --spec "cypress/e2e/features/*.feature"
scripts.cucumber:regression: npm run setup:reports && npx cypress run --e2e --env TAGS="@Regression" --spec "cypress/e2e/features/*.feature"
scripts.cucumber:all-tags: npm run setup:reports && npx cypress run --e2e --env TAGS="@Smoke or @Regression" --spec "cypress/e2e/features/*.feature"
scripts.test:e2e:report: npm run cucumber && npm run report:cucumber && npm run report:dashboard
scripts.test:smoke:report: npm run cucumber:smoke && npm run report:cucumber && npm run report:dashboard
scripts.test:regression:report: npm run cucumber:regression && npm run report:cucumber && npm run report:dashboard
scripts.test:all: npm run test:e2e:report && npm run open:dashboard
